prose:
**Water HOMO–LUMO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, PySCF RKS, exact two-electron integrals), **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, used as-is (single-point calculation, not geometry-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. The HOMO (orbital 4) lies at −8.6037 eV, the LUMO (orbital 5) at +0.3370 eV, yielding a Koopmans-style gap of **8.9406687 eV**. This gap represents the orbital energy difference and overestimates the true vertical excitation energy (Koopmans' theorem limitation). Total electronic energy: −2080.6615 eV. All integrity checks passed; trustworthy = true. No warnings reported.</prose>
